arts.ttl: Report: 'Unstoppable' player has just agreed to leave title-winning club and join Liverpool
arts.sum: Title-winner has agreed to join Liverpool

arts.ttl: Two major signings for Slot: Liverpool planning £91m spending spree for January
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot could reportedly be given the chance to make two major signings to strengthen his Premier League table-topping squad this January. The Reds have been superb since Slot replaced Jurgen Klopp in the summer, with the Dutch tactician majorly over-achieving so far based on pre-season expectations. Mohamed Salah’s DEMANDS to Liverpool have […] The post Two major signings for Slot: Liverpool planning £91m spending spree for January appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: I know the obvious replacement for Liverpool hero - they could get him on a free
arts.sum: Danny Murphy has identified a player he believes his former club Liverpool should attempt to sign

arts.ttl: Newcastle United vs. Liverpool: Arne Slot's Reds must take Premier League clash against Eddie Howe's Toon seriously
arts.sum: Liverpool must take their game against Newcastle United in the Premier League on Wednesday as seriously as they took their clash against Manchester City on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United among those to bank millions more after £442.6m Asia agreement
arts.sum: Jasmine International (JAS) have obtained the sole rights to broadcast Premier League games and FA Cup fixtures in Thailand, Cambodia and Laos for the next six seasons after outbidding current holder TrueVisons. Newcastle United will be among the clubs to benefit from the Premier League's new lucrative television deal in Southeast Asia.

arts.ttl: Wednesday's Transfer Talk Update: Christopher Nkunku, Omar Marmoush, Mohamed Salah
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest confirmed transfer news and speculation from across the footballing world.

arts.ttl: Liverpool Predicted Lineup vs. Newcastle United: Premier League
arts.sum: A trip to St. James' Park is up next for Liverpool looking to maintain, or strengthen, its gap with the pack in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: How to watch Newcastle vs Liverpool: TV channel and live stream for Premier League today
arts.sum: Reds looking to maintain lead at the top of the table

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola names five Liverpool stars who are 'so strong' for Arne Slot
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola's Manchester City suffered a 2-0 loss at Liverpool on Sunday, a result which moved the Reds 11 points clear of the reigning Premier League champions

arts.ttl: Biggest Premier League points gaps as Man City's task to overhaul Liverpool detailed
arts.sum: Defending champions Manchester City are staring at an 11-point deficit to Premier League leaders Liverpool, but City, Manchester United and Arsenal have completed such comebacks
